seo.title: Add-Ons for Gastro Master — Extensions for Webshop, App & POS System | Gastro Master
seo.description: Add-Ons for Gastro Master: QR Code Flyer, Driver App with GPS, QR Code Table System, Display Function, Self-Ordering Kiosk and more. Modularly combinable, fully integrated into cloud POS, webshop and app.

hero.headline: Add-Ons for Gastro Master —
hero.sub: Add exactly the feature your business needs to your existing Gastro Master solution — from trackable QR code flyers to live GPS tracking for drivers and self-ordering kiosks. All add-ons are fully integrated into webshop, app and cloud POS.
hero.subSuffix: For restaurants, delivery services, cafés, bakeries, food courts and franchise concepts.

addons.title: QR Code Flyer
addons.desc: Turn every paper flyer into a measurable ordering channel. One scan leads directly to your webshop or app — without Deliveroo commission, with live tracking per campaign.

addons.title: Driver App with GPS
addons.desc: Live GPS tracking for every delivery, automatic route optimisation and dispatch directly in the POS system. Customers see where the driver is — your team drives more efficiently.
benefits: iOS and Android app for drivers

addons.title: QR Code Table System
addons.desc: Guests scan at the table, choose, order, pay — all via their smartphone. Order lands instantly in POS and kitchen. Less waiting time, higher table turnover, +18% basket through upselling.

addons.title: Display Function
addons.desc: Pick-up screen for guests, kitchen monitor for your team. All open orders in real time, colour-prioritised by product group, without paper chaos. For fast food, bakeries, food courts.

addons.title: Self-Ordering Kiosk
addons.desc: The terminal takes over the counter. Guests order and pay directly on the touchscreen — multilingual, with active upselling, without waiting time. −50% waiting time, +25% average basket.

valueProps.headline: An Ecosystem of Specialists
valueProps.sub: Each add-on solves a concrete problem in day-to-day operations — cleanly integrated into what's already running at your place.

items.title: Modularly combinable
items.desc: Each add-on runs independently — but unfolds its full effect in combination with webshop, app or POS system.

items.title: One central management
items.desc: All add-ons are managed via your existing Gastro Master backoffice — no third parties, no additional logins.

items.title: Ready immediately
items.desc: After booking, add-ons are active within hours to days. Hardware add-ons (screens, kiosks) are installed on-site on request.

grid.headline: All Add-Ons at a Glance — each with clear added value
grid.sub: Choose the add-on that gives your business the most leverage right now. You can add more at any time — without restart, without data migration.

combo.headline: Add-Ons unfold their effect in combination
combo.sub: Most add-ons require the Gastro Master POS system because they synchronise orders, order numbers and kitchen status in real time. The QR Code Flyer also works with webshop or ordering app alone.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions about Add-Ons
faq.sub: Answers to the questions restaurateurs ask us most often about our extensions.

items.q: What are Add-Ons at Gastro Master?
items.a: Add-Ons are extensions for your existing Gastro Master solution — [Webshop](/produkte/webshop), [App](/produkte/app) or [POS System](/produkte/kassensystem). Each solves a concrete problem (marketing, delivery, table service, kitchen monitor, self-ordering) and is fully integrated. You book only what you actually need.

Currently live: [QR Code Flyer](/add-ons/qr-code-flyer) (Marketing), [Driver App with GPS](/add-ons/fahrer-app-gps) (Delivery), [QR Code Table System](/add-ons/qr-code-tischsystem) (Table Service), [Display Function](/add-ons/bildschirmfunktion) (Kitchen & Counter) and [Self-Ordering Kiosk](/add-ons/kiosk) (Self-Service). More extensions are in preparation.

items.q: Do I need the POS system for Add-Ons?
items.a: It depends. The QR Code Flyer works with webshop or app alone. The Driver App, QR Code Table System, Display Function and Kiosk add-ons require the [Gastro Master POS System](/produkte/kassensystem) because they synchronise orders directly with the cloud POS, kitchen monitor and pick-up screen.

Prices vary by function: The QR Code Flyer starts from €65 for 2,500 pieces. Driver App costs +€10 per month per driver, QR Code Table System +€50 per month for 5 tables. Display Function and Self-Ordering Kiosk are hardware-dependent and are calculated individually in a free consultation.

items.q: Can I cancel or add an Add-On later?
items.a: Yes. Add-ons can be activated and cancelled monthly (hardware excluded). You can, for example, use the QR Code Table System during peak season and pause in winter — or start with one kiosk and add more terminals as your business grows.

items.q: How quickly are Add-Ons ready to use?
items.a: Software add-ons (QR Code Flyer, Driver App, QR Code Table System) are active within a few hours after booking. Hardware add-ons (Display Function, Kiosk) require 2–4 weeks for delivery, configuration and on-site installation.
